# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config'

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
}

type FeatureFlags = Record<string, boolean>

const DEFAULTS = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {} as FeatureFlags,
}

function asString(value: unknown): string | undefined {
  return typeof value === 'string' ? value : undefined
}

function asBoolean(value: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  return typeof value === 'boolean' ? value : undefined
}

function asRecordBoolean(value: unknown): FeatureFlags | undefined {
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(value)) return undefined
  const out: FeatureFlags = {}
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>)) {
    if (typeof v === 'boolean') out[k] = v
  }
  return out
}

async function readConfig() {
  const edgeConfigId = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG

  let apiKey = DEFAULTS.API_KEY
  let dbUrl = DEFAULTS.DB_URL
  let featureFlags: FeatureFlags = { ...DEFAULTS.FEATURE_FLAGS }

  if (edgeConfigId) {
    const [apiKeyVal, dbUrlVal, flagsVal] = await Promise.all([
      get('API_KEY'),
      get('DB_URL'),
      get('FEATURE_FLAGS'),
    ])

    apiKey = asString(apiKeyVal) ?? apiKey
    dbUrl = asString(dbUrlVal) ?? dbUrl
    featureFlags = asRecordBoolean(flagsVal) ?? featureFlags
  }

  return { apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, edgeConfigId: edgeConfigId ?? null }
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url)
  const { apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, edgeConfigId } = await readConfig()

  const feature = url.searchParams.get('feature')
  const enabled = feature ? (featureFlags[feature] ?? false) : undefined

  const body = {
    ok: true,
    edgeConfig: {
      configured: Boolean(edgeConfigId),
      id: edgeConfigId,
    },
    config: {
      apiKey,
      dbUrl,
      featureFlags,
    },
    featureQuery: feature
      ? {
          feature,
          enabled,
        }
      : null,
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body, null, 2), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
      'cache-control': 'no-store',
    },
  })
}
